sampling_strategy: 3 x 5-minute chunks (start, middle, end) of 75-minute video

patterns.vocal_consistency: Tight LRA across all chunks (3.6-4.1 LU) indicates heavily compressed/consistent narration
patterns.opening_louder: Opening vocals are ~5 dB louder than body/end (energetic hook)
patterns.music_dynamic_range: Music has wide dynamic range in opening (25.3 LU), moderate in middle (15.1 LU), narrow at end (6.9 LU)
patterns.music_energy_opening: Opening has loudest music with distinct peaks (anime clips / action scenes)
patterns.music_energy_end: End section has minimal music - narration dominant, suggesting reflective/conclusion mode
patterns.narration_density: 97.7-99.4% narration coverage - nearly zero dead air
patterns.vocal_music_gap: Opening: 14.4 dB, Middle: 9.6 dB, End: 34.0 dB gap between vocals and music
